label: Native Codex App + codex-toys
description: Operator-mediated Codex App run with codex-toys plugins, skills, workbench conventions, and CLI affordances available.
affordances: codex-toys CLI, workbench, feed, dispatch, delegation, toybox, and thread-state commands
promptAddendum: Use codex-toys surfaces when they materially reduce work or improve reliability. Do not use codex exec as the benchmark surface.

operatorInstructions: Open or create a Codex App thread rooted at the target cwd.
Make sure the codex-toys plugins/skills intended for this host are enabled before starting.
Use native App tools and codex-toys affordances naturally; the eval is measuring their combined workflow.
Do not translate the task into codex exec.
